key_finding: V-cache at arithmetic '=' positions encodes intermediate computation results at R=0.949 (text=0.606, gap +0.34). V|text=0.889, V|gold=0.719 — step-specific computation. V_eq>>V_prompt (gap +0.63) — rules out problem encoding. Division gap=+0.648 > multiplication=+0.384 > addition=+0.130 (operation nonlinearity gradient). Forward-looking: V at -5 tokens R=0.794. All 8/8 TRUE, 0/5 FALSE. z=26-32, p<0.001.
evidence_impact: STRONGEST Phase 2 evidence. First intermediate-value probe directly demonstrates ongoing hidden computation at exact arithmetic positions. Decisively addresses exp 105 problem-encoding confound. Complements V|nums position-sweep with step-level precision.
next_planned: Cross-model intermediate value replication on Phi-3.5-mini
